name: Golf 20Fore7
about: Golf 20Fore7 is a dual-location golf simulator facility in Cotati and Santa Rosa, CA, offering year-round access to indoor golfing experiences. The venue features state-of-the-art launch monitor technology in private bays, with 3 total bays available that accommodate both left and right-handed players. Non-members can book sessions at $49 per hour per bay, while members enjoy included access and additional benefits. Cotati offers a unique multi-sport bay featuring activities like Frisbee golf, Wild West Shootout, Football, and Zombie Dodgeball alongside traditional golf simulation.
why_golfers_like_it: Multi-sport options for variety and entertainment
High-end launch monitor technology for accurate tracking
